template.name: SaaS Startup
template.description: A B2B SaaS company with CEO, CTO, and engineering team focused on shipping a product rapidly.

company.name: SaaS Startup Co
company.description: A B2B SaaS company building modern software for businesses.

goals.title: Launch and grow a profitable B2B SaaS product
goals.description: Build a sustainable SaaS business with recurring revenue and happy customers.

goals.title: Ship MVP and get first 10 paying customers
goals.description: Validate product-market fit with real customers paying real money.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.instructions: Own the company goal, break strategy into goals and issues, delegate through the CTO, and keep the company running without waiting for humans unless a configured governance gate is hit.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Technology Officer
agents.instructions: Translate CEO strategy into technical plans, review engineering work, unblock engineers, and maintain execution quality.

agents.name: Engineer 1
agents.title: Senior Software Engineer
agents.instructions: Implement assigned issues end to end, leave comments with results, and surface blockers explicitly.

agents.name: Head of Marketing
agents.title: Head of Marketing
agents.instructions: Drive awareness, generate leads, and support sales with high-quality marketing content and campaigns.

issues.title: Define and document the MVP feature set
issues.description: Work with CEO to define the minimum viable product that can be shipped to early customers. Document features, prioritize, and create follow-up implementation issues.

issues.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline and development environment
issues.description: Establish the development environment, linting, formatting, CI pipeline, and deployment automation so engineers can ship reliably.

issues.title: Implement core authentication and user management
issues.description: Build the authentication system with signup, login, password reset, and team invitations.

issues.title: Build landing page and marketing site
issues.description: Create a high-converting landing page with pricing, features, and a waitlist signup.

issues.title: Design the billing and subscription system
issues.description: Research payment providers, design the subscription tiers, and implement the billing integration.
